00025 
00026 /*=========================================================================
00027  * SYSTEM:    KVM
00028  * SUBSYSTEM: JAR file reader.
00029  * FILE:      jar.h
00030  * OVERVIEW:  Public header file for the JAR file reader module.
00031  *            The JAR DataStream API is used by the Pre-verifier for loading
00032  *          JAR files.
00033  *=======================================================================*/
00034 
00035 #ifndef _JAR_H_
00036 #define _JAR_H_
00037 
00038 #include "wrappers.h"
00039 
00040 #include "typedefs.h"
00041 
00042 /*
00043  * Debug flag for JAR support
00044  */
00045 #define JAR_DEBUG 0
00046 
00047 /*=========================================================================
00048  * JAR file reader defines and macros
00049  *=======================================================================*/
00050 
00051 /*
00052  * Supported compression types
00053  */
00054 #define STORED        0
00055 #define DEFLATED    8
00056 
00057 #define MAX_BITS 15    /* Maximum number of codes in Huffman Code Table */
00058 
00059 /*
00060  * Header sizes including signatures
00061  */
00062 #define LOCHDRSIZ 30
00063 #define CENHDRSIZ 46
00064 #define ENDHDRSIZ 22
00065 
00066 /*
00067  * Header field access macros
00068  */
00069 #define CH(b, n) ((long)(((unsigned char *)(b))[n]))
00070 #define SH(b, n) ((long)(CH(b, n) | (CH(b, n+1) << 8)))
00071 #define LG(b, n) ((long)(SH(b, n) | (SH(b, n+2) << 16)))
00072 
00073 #define GETSIG(b) LG(b, 0)        /* signature */
00074 
00075 #define LOCSIG (('P' << 0) + ('K' << 8) + (3 << 16) + (4 << 24))
00076 #define CENSIG (('P' << 0) + ('K' << 8) + (1 << 16) + (2 << 24))
00077 #define ENDSIG (('P' << 0) + ('K' << 8) + (5 << 16) + (6 << 24))
00078 
00079 #define freeBytes(x) if (x == NULL) {} else free(x)
00080 
00081 /*
00082  * Macros for getting local file header (LOC) fields
00083  */
00084 #define LOCVER(b) SH(b, 4)        /* version needed to extract */
00085 #define LOCFLG(b) SH(b, 6)        /* encrypt flags */
00086 #define LOCHOW(b) SH(b, 8)        /* compression method */
00087 #define LOCTIM(b) LG(b, 10)        /* modification time */
00088 #define LOCCRC(b) LG(b, 14)        /* uncompressed file crc-32 value */
00089 #define LOCSIZ(b) LG(b, 18)        /* compressed size */
00090 #define LOCLEN(b) LG(b, 22)        /* uncompressed size */
00091 #define LOCNAM(b) SH(b, 26)        /* filename size */
00092 #define LOCEXT(b) SH(b, 28)        /* extra field size */
00093 
00094 /*
00095  * Macros for getting central directory header (CEN) fields
00096  */
00097 #define CENVEM(b) SH(b, 4)        /* version made by */
00098 #define CENVER(b) SH(b, 6)        /* version needed to extract */
00099 #define CENFLG(b) SH(b, 8)        /* general purpose bit flags */
00100 #define CENHOW(b) SH(b, 10)        /* compression method */
00101 #define CENTIM(b) LG(b, 12)        /* file modification time (DOS format) */
00102 #define CENCRC(b) LG(b, 16)        /* crc of uncompressed data */
00103 #define CENSIZ(b) LG(b, 20)        /* compressed size */
00104 #define CENLEN(b) LG(b, 24)        /* uncompressed size */
00105 #define CENNAM(b) SH(b, 28)        /* length of filename */
00106 #define CENEXT(b) SH(b, 30)        /* length of extra field */
00107 #define CENCOM(b) SH(b, 32)        /* file comment length */
00108 #define CENDSK(b) SH(b, 34)        /* disk number start */
00109 #define CENATT(b) SH(b, 36)        /* internal file attributes */
00110 #define CENATX(b) LG(b, 38)        /* external file attributes */
00111 #define CENOFF(b) LG(b, 42)        /* offset of local header */
00112 
00113 /*
00114  * Macros for getting end of central directory header (END) fields
00115  */
00116 #define ENDSUB(b) SH(b, 8)        /* number of entries on this disk */
00117 #define ENDTOT(b) SH(b, 10)        /* total number of entries */
00118 #define ENDSIZ(b) LG(b, 12)        /* central directory size */
00119 #define ENDOFF(b) LG(b, 16)        /* central directory offset */
00120 #define ENDCOM(b) SH(b, 20)        /* size of zip file comment */
00121 
00122 /*=========================================================================
00123  * Macros for Huffman Codes used by the JAR file reader
00124  *=======================================================================*/
00125 
00126 /*
00127  * This is the algorithm for decoding Huffman-encoded
00128  * data.
00129  *
00130  *     loop (until end of block code recognized)
00131  *        decode literal/length value from input stream
00132  *        if value < 256
00133  *           copy value (literal byte) to output stream
00134  *        otherwise
00135  *           if value = end of block (256)
00136  *              break from loop
00137  *           otherwise (value = 257..285)
00138  *              decode distance from input stream
00139  *
00140  *              move backwards distance bytes in the output
00141  *              stream, and copy length bytes from this
00142  *              position to the output stream.
00143  *     end loop
00144  */
00145 #define BTYPE_NO_COMPRESSION 0x00
00146 #define BTYPE_FIXED_HUFFMAN  0x01  /* Fixed Huffman Code */
00147 #define BTYPE_DYNA_HUFFMAN   0x02  /* Dynamic Huffman code */
00148 #define BTYPE_INVALID        0x03  /* Invalid code */
00149 
00150 #define LITXLEN_BASE 257
00151 
00152 /*=========================================================================
00153  * JAR DataStream API for reading and writing to/from JAR files
00154  *=======================================================================*/
00155 
00156 #define JAR_READ 1        /* Mode for reading from a JAR data stream */
00157 #define JAR_WRITE 2        /* Mode for writing from a JAR data stream */
00158 #define JAR_RESOURCE 1        /* type of resource (see JAR_DataStream) */
00159 
00160 /*=========================================================================
00161  * JAR Data Stream structure
00162  *=======================================================================*/
00163 typedef struct JAR_DataStream {
00164     unsigned char *data;    /* data stream for reading/writing */
00165     int type;        /* indicates type of resource */
00166     int dataLen;        /* length of data stream */
00167     int dataIndex;        /* current position for reading */
00168     int mode;        /* mode for reading or writing */
00169                 /* mode must be either JAR_READ or JAR_WRITE */
00170 } JAR_DataStream;
00171 
00172 typedef struct JAR_DataStream* JAR_DataStreamPtr;
00173 
00174 /*=========================================================================
00175  * Forward declarations for JAR DataStream API
00176  *=======================================================================*/
00177 int JAR_ReadBytes(JAR_DataStream *ds, char *buf, int len);
00178 int JAR_WriteBytes(JAR_DataStream *ds, char *buf, int len);
00179 int JAR_SkipBytes(JAR_DataStream *ds, int len);
00180 
00181 /*=========================================================================
00182  * Forward declarations for JAR file reader
00183  *=======================================================================*/
00184 
00185 typedef FILE *JarCompressedType;
00186 /*
00187 typedef const unsigned char *JarCompressedType;
00188 */
00189 
00190 bool inflate(JarCompressedType data, int compLen,
00191              unsigned char *decompData, int decompLen);
00192 
00193 /* Any caller to inflate must ensure that it is safe to read at least
00194  * this many bytes beyond compData + compLen
00195  */
00196 #define INFLATER_EXTRA_BYTES 4
00197 
00198 /*
00199  * Indicates whether JAR inflater is executed from KVM or a stand-alone
00200  * program.
00201  */
00202 #define JAR_INFLATER_INSIDE_KVM 0
00203 
00204 #endif /* _JAR_H_ */
Generated on Mon Mar 14 2016 15:25:28 for @PACKAGE_NAME@ by  1.7.1
